insights.headline: Comparing Source (103 rows) to Day 1 (103 rows), matched by Project Name: about 35.9% of rows changed in some way — a lot of change.
narrative: Comparing Source (103 rows) to Day 1 (103 rows), matched by Project Name: about 35.9% of rows changed in some way — a lot of change.
6 new records showed up, 4 records went missing, 17 existing records had something change.
Some Project Name values show up more than once: 6 in Source and 4 in Day 1 — worth checking these should really be unique.
The changes are spread across a few different columns, most often 'Customer', 'Project Description', 'Product Estimated'.
'Product Estimated' also changed several times (7) — mostly changed to a different value.
'Project Description' also changed several times (7) — mostly filled in for the first time.
The numbers in 'Cost Per Trip/Day' generally increased in Day 1, by about 18.66 on average.
The busiest day was 2027-01-01, with more changes than any other day — see the chart below.

clusters.shape: filled in for the first time
filled in for the first time
